name: EOD batch overrun
label: SynthBank synthetic data

correlation.note: CBS-DB saturation + downstream internet-banking timeouts are one incident

rootCause.note: RCA must surface the prior-evening config change first (smoking gun), timed before the incident

recommendedAction.text: Review/roll back CHG-20260610-001; relieve CBS-DB connection pressure before peak — human attests/executes.

honestGaps: the app-vs-infra boundary is not separable from this data (batch logic vs DB saturation)
